positive: A stylized, mystical jungle scene silhouette featuring abstract flora, luminous glowing mushrooms, and whimsical fauna like stylized hummingbirds and iridescent butterflies. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for a clean, single-panel apparel print. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, emerald green, and vibrant teal, with the main light source emanating from the bioluminescent elements, creating dramatic backlighting and crisp outlines. Vector-graphic quality, etched ink style, ultra-detailed, full color, perfect for screen printing.
